arts.ttl: Sunday's Bundesliga predictions including Bayer Leverkusen vs. Hoffenheim
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Bayer Leverkusen vs. Hoffenheim.

arts.ttl: Official | Hoffenheim bring goalkeeper Jakob Busk back to Germany
arts.sum: Hoffenheim officially brought long-time 1. FC Union Berlin keeper Jakob Busk back to German football on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Hoffenheim preview: Champions looking to close gap to Bayern
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen will look to close the nine-point gap to Bayern Munich when they welcome Hoffenheim to the BayArena on Sunday.
Hoffenheim officially confirmed the signing of Ivorian winger Bazoumana Touré on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Hoffenheim seal signing of Ivorian youngster
arts.sum: TSG Hoffenheim have completed the signing of Ivorian youth international Bazoumana Touré.
TSG Hoffenheim have reacted to Oliver Baumann's injury by bringing in Danish goalkeeper Jakob Busk.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Hoffenheim - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Bayer Leverkusen and Hoffenheim, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Hoffenheim set to sign Ivorian winger Bazoumana Touré for €10m
arts.sum: Florian Plettenberg reports that TSG 1899 Hoffenheim are set to complete another major transfer.
